event: no family history of gastrointestinal disease
amniotic fluid stained with thick meconium
transferred to NICU on nasal CPAP
oral feeding started on day 2 (breast and formula)
hyperchloremic metabolic acidosis (pH 7.18, HCO3 12.3 mmol/L, BE -14.9, Cl- 129 mmol/L)
loose watery bloodless stools with mucus
oral feeding attempts caused weight loss
oral feeding attempts caused metabolic acidosis
persistent diarrhea despite fasting (120 ml/kg/day stool output)
normal repeated cultures (blood, stool, urine, CMV)
normal imaging (cerebral, abdominal, cardiac, renal ultrasound)
